errors.title: Error
errors.loading_presets: Failed to load presets. Please refresh the page.
errors.no_presets_message: No built-in presets are available. Please check your configuration.
errors.incompatible_light_message: One or more selected lights are not supported Aqara models. Please select only T1M, T1 Strip, or T2 bulb lights.

presets.manage_description_with_selection: Click a preset to activate it, or use the edit/delete buttons.
presets.no_presets_description: Use the other tabs to create and save your custom presets.
presets.create_first_effect: Create your first effect preset in the Effects tab.
presets.create_first_pattern: Create your first segment pattern in the Patterns tab.
presets.create_first_cct: Create your first CCT sequence in the CCT tab.
presets.create_first_segment: Create your first segment sequence in the Segments tab.

dialogs.create_effect_description: Create custom dynamic effect presets with your choice of colors, speed, and brightness.
dialogs.create_pattern_description: Design custom segment patterns by setting individual segment colors.
dialogs.create_cct_description: Build color temperature sequences with multiple steps and timing controls.
dialogs.create_segment_description: Design animated segment sequences with multiple steps and transition effects.
dialogs.compatibility_warning_effects: The selected light does not support dynamic effects. Compatible models: T2 RGB, T1M, T1 Strip.
dialogs.compatibility_warning_patterns: The selected light does not support segment patterns. Compatible models: T1M, T1 Strip.
dialogs.compatibility_warning_cct: The selected light does not support CCT sequences. Compatible models: T2 RGB, T2 CCT, T1M, T1 Strip.
dialogs.compatibility_warning_segments: The selected light does not support segment sequences. Compatible models: T1M, T1 Strip.

config.transition_description: Configure the transition curve for T2 bulbs when changing states.

transition_curve.title: Transition curve
transition_curve.subtitle: Drag on the graph to adjust

tooltips.mode_select: Toggle select mode - when active, clicking segments toggles selection
tooltips.mode_clear: Toggle clear mode - when active, clicking segments removes their color

editors.no_steps_message: No steps defined. Click "Add step" to create your first step.
editors.select_lights_for_preview_effects: Select light entities in the Activate tab to preview effects on your devices.
editors.select_lights_for_preview_patterns: Select light entities in the Activate tab to preview patterns on your devices.
editors.select_lights_for_preview_sequences: Select light entities in the Activate tab to preview sequences on your devices.
